---
title: "Josh Persi"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://fosstodon.org/@joshpersi
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/josh-persi
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/josh-persi/

---

Hi, I'm Josh Persi. I'm a data scientist with the Canadian Food Inspection Agency. I help the agency understand emerging risks to plant health by building statistical and spatial models of pest spread. My academic background is in ecology, particularly plant ecology, and much of my prior work experience was spent performing field experiments and botanical inventories.
